prompt: ICM pressure proxy: choose the best action.
why_v1: Fold protects tournament life when pressure and risk premium are too high.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Folding fits the tournament cue set, so the line protects tournament life when the pressure and payout cost are against you.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Folding is stronger here because ICM pressure raises the cost of busting, so survival matters more than chasing a thin chip gain. When the hand cannot continue profitably through that risk premium, preserving tournament life is the better trade.
